name: Greek Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 large 8 oz loaf French bread, unsliced
1/2 cup pepperoncini peppers, drained and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first three ingredients in a bowl and stir until smooth.
2. Slice the bread loaf in half lengthwise.
3. Spread the cheese mixture on the cut sides of the bread.
4. Sprinkle feta cheese, olives, and peppers over the cream cheese mixture.
5. Place the bread on an ungreased baking sheet.
6. Bake at 375 degrees F for 15 to 20 minutes or until thoroughly heated.
